zh.lifeSummary: 當Mechthild von Holstein de holland於1190年出生在海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫哈姆馬克時，她的父親Count Adolf III of Schauenburg and Holstein30歲，母親Adelheid von Querfurt21歲。她和Otto Count von Tecklenburg至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1262年4月10日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 斯坦福特特可倫波格享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mechthild von Holstein de holland于1190年出生在海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫哈姆馬克时，她的父亲Count Adolf III of Schauenburg and Holstein30岁，母亲Adelheid von Querfurt21岁。她和Otto Count von Tecklenburg至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1262年4月10日在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 斯坦福特特可倫波格享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Holstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from the province of Holstein, long disputed between Germany and Denmark. This gets its name from holsten, the dative plural, originally used after a preposition, of holst, from Middle Low German holt-sate ‘dweller in the woods’ (from Middle Low German holt ‘wood’ + sate, sete ‘tenant’). The final syllable has been erroneously altered by analogy with North German Steen ‘stone’, which in South German and standard German has the form Stein.

variants.name: Hulstein
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Gerrit, Albertus, Kees.
Dutch vowel variant of German   Holstein  .

variants.name: Hollstein
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Hans, Heinz, Klaus, Kurt, Otto, Ulrich.
German: variant of   Holstein  , or perhaps a habitational name from Hollstein on the Werra River.

variants.name: Holst
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Jorgen, Erik, Vibeke, Anders, Carsten, Ludvig, Sven.
North German and Scandinavian: habitational name for someone from Holstein (see Holstein ), a derivative of German Holtsate, Danish Holtsete ‘person from Holstein’.
Dutch (also Van Holst): habitational name for someone from any of several places so called, from holst, hulst ‘holly (forest)’. Compare Hulst .

variants.name: Holsten
meanings: North German: variant of   Holstein   or   Holst  .

nameMeanings.name: Mechthild
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Mechthild von Holstein de holland was born in 1190, in Mark, Hamm, Westphalia, Prussia, her father, Count Adolf III of Schauenburg and Holstein, was 30 and her mother, Adelheid von Querfurt, was 21. She had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Otto Count von Tecklenburg. She died on 10 April 1262, in Tecklenburg, Steinfurt, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mechthild von Holstein de holland est née en 1190, à Mark, Hamm, Provinz Westfalen, Prusse, son père, Count Adolf III of Schauenburg and Holstein, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Querfurt, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Otto Count von Tecklenburg. Elle est décédée le 10 avril 1262, à Tecklenburg, Kreis Steinfurt, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 72 ans.

historicEvents.description: Die Stadt Tecklenburg wurde 1226 als Suburbium urkundlich erwähnt und 1388 erstmals „Stadt“ genannt.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mechthild von Holstein de holland 1190 in Mark, Hamm, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Count Adolf III of Schauenburg and Holstein 30 und ihre Mutter Adelheid von Querfurt 21. Sie hatte mit Otto Count von Tecklenburg mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. April 1262 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Tecklenburg, Kreis Steinfurt, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mechthild von Holstein de holland è nata il nel 1190 nel Mark, Hamm, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, sua padre, Count Adolf III of Schauenburg and Holstein, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Adelheid von Querfurt, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Otto Count von Tecklenburg. Morì il 10 aprile 1262, nel Tecklenburg, Kreis Steinfurt, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 72 anni.

ko.Tecklenburg, Tecklenburg, Westphalia, Pr: 독일 플레우ss 플로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 테클렌버그 테클렌버그
ko.lifeSummary: Mechthild von Holstein de holland(이)가 1190년 플레우ss 플로빈츠 웨스트파렌 해 마크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Count Adolf III of Schauenburg and Holstein(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid von Querfurt(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Otto Count von Tecklenburg(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1262년 4월 10일 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 크레이스 스타인퍼트 테클렌버그에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mechthild von Holstein de holland nasceu em 1190, em Mark, Hamm, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, seu pai, Count Adolf III of Schauenburg and Holstein, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Querfurt, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Otto Count von Tecklenburg. Ela faleceu em 10 de abril de 1262, em Tecklenburg, Kreis Steinfurt, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mechthild von Holstein de holland родилась в 1190 г. в местности марк, хамм, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, её отцу по имени Count Adolf III of Schauenburg and Holstein было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Querfurt, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Otto Count von Tecklenburg. Она умерла 10 апреля 1262 г. в местности теккленбург, крис стинфурт, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 72 лет.
